hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Serena auto-activation: if you have not yet called mcp__plugin_serena_serena__activate_project(project=ToDoWallApp) in this session, do it before the first code search. Check: if get_current_config returns no active project, activate now. Parameter reminder: find_symbol uses name_path_pattern, search_for_pattern uses substring_pattern — never swap these."}'
